caption: A news broadcast features Nitish Kumar, the Chief Minister of Bihar, wearing a dark suit and tie, speaking into multiple microphones, including one with an "ANI" logo. He is surrounded by other men in formal attire. Small inset portrait photos of officials, including "संतोष सुमन" (Santosh Suman) and "सुमित कुमार" (Sumit Kumar), appear on the right side of the screen. A red and yellow ticker runs across the bottom, while a red banner at the top reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की ‘पिक्चर’ बाकी है". The caption "नीतीश कुमार, CM, बिहार" appears above the CM. The bottom ticker text evolves across the sequence, starting with "PM ने बिहार के दोनों डिप्टी CM को बधाई दी" and shifting to "PM ने बिहार". Text on the left side of the frames mentions "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "डिप्टी CM", "शत्रुघ्न चौधरी", and "विजय सिन्हा". A timestamp of "10:04 PM" is visible in the bottom right corner.
